instructions: (Claude Code's built-in system prompt; see --bare mode docs)

queries.user_text:
You're debugging a real-codebase bug in `yara-3` (project `yara`, an open-source C/C++ project from the BugsC++ corpus).

The buggy source tree is on the host at `C:\Users\Owner\OneDrive\Documents\Classes\COS\COS484\chatdbgpro\data\workspaces\yara-3\yara\buggy-3` and is also mounted at `/work` inside a Linux/amd64 container named `bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537` (gdb, the buggy binary, and all build deps live in that container; the binary is NOT runnable on this host directly).

Buggy binary inside the container: `(not pre-identified — find via failing-test command)`
Failing test invocation:           `bash -c bash -c 'echo return 102 > tests/defects4cpp.lua' && make -j1 check`
Observed behavior:                  `exit_code:2`
Bug type:                          `other`
Language:                          `c`

How to investigate
------------------
* To READ source code, use Read / Grep / your normal tools — the source tree is at `C:\Users\Owner\OneDrive\Documents\Classes\COS\COS484\chatdbgpro\data\workspaces\yara-3\yara\buggy-3` (it's been added via `--add-dir`).
* To RUN the binary, run gdb, or execute anything else inside the build environment, use Bash with this template:

      docker exec -i -w /work bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c '<cmd>'

  e.g.
      docker exec -w /work bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'ls -la'
      docker exec -w /work bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'gdb -batch -ex run -ex bt --args bash -c bash -c 'echo return 102 > tests/defects4cpp.lua' && make -j1 check'

  The container is dedicated to this case; it'll be torn down when this session ends, so don't worry about cleanup.

Final answer
------------
Identify the root cause in the source, propose both a local fix and a structural global fix.

Your final response MUST include three labelled paragraphs:

  ROOT CAUSE: <file:line and what is wrong>
  LOCAL FIX:  <minimal code change>
  GLOBAL FIX: <structural change preventing this CLASS of bug>

Do NOT modify the source files on disk. Just investigate and produce the diagnosis as your final assistant message.

queries.response:
I'll investigate the bug by examining the modified files and running the failing test in the container.

---

The failing test is `test-atoms`. Let me get more details.

---

No output. Let me look at the test source code and compare the changed files.

---

The failing test is case 102 — testing hex pattern `{?? 11 22 33 ?? 55 66 }` atom selection. Let me examine the relevant modified files.

---

The parent commit apparently doesn't have the generated files. Let me look at atoms.c directly and the hex_grammar source.

---

Now let me look at atoms.c to understand atom extraction logic.

---

I can see the issue. Let me examine the critical section where `best_atom` is updated.

tool_calls.call: docker exec -w /work bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'git diff HEAD~1 HEAD -- libyara/grammar.c libyara/grammar.h libyara/hex_grammar.c libyara/hex_grammar.h libyara/hex_lexer.c libyara/re_grammar.c libyara/re_grammar.h 2>&1 | head -200'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'echo return 102 > tests/defects4cpp.lua && make -j1 check 2>&1 | tail -50'

docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && git diff HEAD~1 HEAD -- libyara/grammar.c libyara/grammar.h libyara/hex_grammar.c libyara/hex_grammar.h libyara/hex_lexer.c libyara/re_grammar.c libyara/re_grammar.h 2>&1 | head -300'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && echo return 102 > tests/defects4cpp.lua && make -j1 check 2>&1 | tail -80'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && cat test-suite.log 2>&1 | head -100'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && find . -name "*.c" | xargs grep -l "test-atoms\|test_atoms" 2>&1 | head -20'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && ls tests/ 2>&1'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && grep -n "1025\|issue" libyara/hex_lexer.c libyara/hex_grammar.c libyara/grammar.c 2>&1 | head -30'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && diff <(git show HEAD~1:libyara/hex_grammar.c 2>/dev/null) libyara/hex_grammar.c 2>&1 | head -100'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && grep -n "1025\|yr_re_ast_extract_atoms\|atoms_from_re_node\|hex_gram" libyara/atoms.c | head -50'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && grep -n "RE_NODE_RANGE_ANY\|atoms_from_re_node\|_append_left\|append_right\|concat" libyara/atoms.c | head -60'
docker exec -i bench-t4-5d93549e527446f18537 bash -c 'cd /work && grep -n "_yr_atoms_trim\|atoms_trim" libyara/atoms.c | head -20'
